# M6 — VC Portfolio Deep Sweep (Tier A + B + C)

**Operator:** Jeff Aragon
**Generated by:** Agent M6 — VC Portfolio Deep Sweep
**Run date:** 2026-04-25
**Brief:** Deep sweep across mid-stage and late-stage VCs (Tier A: Sequoia, a16z, Founders Fund, Greylock, Benchmark, Accel, Index, Lightspeed, Bessemer, Battery, ICONIQ, Insight, General Catalyst, Bain Capital Ventures, NEA, Norwest, IVP, Khosla, Felicis. Tier B Japan/intl: Sozo, WiL, Globis, JAFCO, SBI, B Capital, TPG Tech Adjacencies, SoftBank Vision, DCM, Sapphire, Coatue. Tier C vertical: Polaris, F-Prime, ARCH, a16z Bio+Health, Oak HC/FT, Town Hall, Define, .406, Paladin, Ten Eleven, ClearSky, AllegisCyber, Decibel.)

**APEX RULE:** 100% truth. URLs verified live where stated; otherwise flagged UNVERIFIED. Voice: no em dashes, "will" not "would". Honest yield numbers below.

---

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY — HONEST CAPTURE RATE

- **Brief target:** 40-60 net-new candidates with full data (company, stage, last raise, fund, role, JD floor, apply URL, company URL, fit score).
- **Actual yield this sweep:** **17 net-new ranked entries** (8 verified-live posted seats + 9 anchor / cold-DM tier).
- **Why short of target:**
  1. Every Tier-A VC fund (a16z, Sequoia, Greylock, Bessemer, Lightspeed, ICONIQ, Insight, General Catalyst, Battery, BCV, Norwest, IVP, Felicis, Sapphire, B Capital, Decibel, Oak HC/FT, Khosla) uses the same Consider-powered job board pattern. Those boards return JS-rendered placeholders to my fetcher. URL-parameter filters do not propagate through the fetch path. I can confirm portfolio-aggregate company counts but cannot drill into role-filtered listings without browser session.
  2. Many Ashby-hosted role URLs (Tennr, Ambience, Rad AI, Sardine, Outtake, Cognition, Traba, Sprinter Health, Listen Labs, Auctor) returned thin renders showing only "Jobs" header. Google site-search recovers job titles but not full JD context. I followed up with topic-specific funding-round searches to triangulate stage + investors.
  3. Several deep-search returns were already in dedup files (Garner Health, Cohere Health, Adaptive Security, Garner Health VPs, Tava Health, Eve Legal, Wonderful, Amperos Health, Hippocratic AI Customer Success Executives, Bluefish AI, AcuityMD, Onebrief, Coast).
  4. A meaningful fraction of "VC backed Series B" companies surfaced on TopStartups.io are at altitude BELOW Jeff's seat (Pylon Sales Manager, Listen Labs Account Executive, Traba GTM Manager, Cognition Director Enterprise Sales — these are SDR / Manager / Director-IC tier, not VP / Head of Sales / CRO).
- **What this sweep DOES deliver:** A clean partition into A) verified-live posted senior seats not in dedup, B) anchor / cold-DM tier (recently funded, leadership seat imminent, no posted role yet), C) skip-with-reason. Plus methodology notes for next-run improvement.

## METHODOLOGY NOTES (for next sweep)

- **Best-yield path next time:** Fund-specific topstartups.io URL + Google site-search on the company-specific Ashby/Greenhouse subdomain. Pattern is `site:jobs.ashbyhq.com/[company] "Head of Sales" OR "VP Sales" OR "Director of Sales"`.
- **Worst-yield path:** Generic Consider job-board WebFetch — they do not server-render listings.
- **Topstartups.io is a good seed list** for a fund's recently funded portfolio + investor names + jobs URL aggregator, BUT the fit-rank requires drilling into each company's actual ATS.
- **Tier B Japan funds** (WiL, Globis, JAFCO, SBI) do not maintain English-language portfolio job boards. Next sweep should use BRIDGE Japan (thebridge.jp) + The Japan Times + JETRO listings + direct LinkedIn search on portfolio companies for "US Country Manager" or "Head of US" patterns. CADDi, FuriosaAI, RECERQA already in dedup.
- **Tier C cyber funds** (Paladin, Ten Eleven, ClearSky, AllegisCyber) do NOT maintain aggregator job boards. Next sweep should mine portfolio pages directly + cross-reference with Lightspeed Cyber60 + Greylock Cybersecurity tag.
- **Critical fit-filter to apply earlier:** Experience-band ceiling pre-flight check. Filter all "Founding GTM" + "Founding Head of Sales" listings against JD experience text BEFORE adding to ranked top-N. The Fastino / StackOne lessons mean any "2-7 yrs" JD goes straight to skip.
